title: Disgaea PC / 魔界戦記ディスガイア PC

title: Disgaea PC / 魔界戦記ディスガイア PC

notes: The game works flawlessly, but it requires to be played in windowed mode. Any attempt to play in fullscreen results in UI misplacement and other graphical glitches, and makes the game crash when you launch it again, except if the config.ini was deleted.
title: Disgaea PC / 魔界戦記ディスガイア PC

notes: The game works fine, but only in windowed mode. Fullscreen crashes the game.
title: Disgaea PC / 魔界戦記ディスガイア PC
Disgaea PC / 魔界戦記ディスガイア PC

notes: The game will show a black window and then crash if the game window is resized, meaning it does not play well with tiling window managers. To fix this (or any general issue with launching the game), run "protontricks 405900 winecfg" (without quotes) in a terminal and enable "Emulate a virtual desktop", set to your screen's native resolution (e.g. 1280x720, 1920x1080, etc.). From there, you can freely resize the game window without worrying about crashing. Other users have reported that you need to remove "game.cfg" in the game directory every time you launch it, but I haven't experienced this issue myself.
title: Disgaea PC / 魔界戦記ディスガイア PC

notes:
Can play without issues on windowed mode, fails to launch on fullscreen.
On fulscreen, the game won't work, and will crash on launch unless you delete "game.cfg" in local files.
title: Disgaea PC / 魔界戦記ディスガイア PC

notes: Fullscreen doesn't work, but you can use a custom window size. I had to force Steam Input off for my gamepad to work.
title: Disgaea PC / 魔界戦記ディスガイア PC
Disgaea PC / 魔界戦記ディスガイア PC

notes:
As others have pointed out, tiling window managers tend to crash the game on launch. If you happen to be using i3wm, you can add the following line to your i3 config to prevent this from happening:
for_window [class="steam_app_405900"] floating enable
title: Disgaea PC

notes: Technically playable, but a cursor position bug forces playing in 720p when using mouse input - the larger the window, the more broken the cursor is. Fullscreen mode doesn't work at all. "PrettyPrinny" OpenGL improvement mod crashes the game with no error. Same issues when using Proton-GE.
title: Disgaea PC
